_description: Append-only scoreboard. Every benchmark run — accepted or rejected — gets a new entry. The entire improvement trajectory is auditable from this single file.
_rules: Never delete or modify previous entries — only append
Each entry must include git commit hash and exact run command
mAP = COCO val2017 mAP@0.5:0.95 unless otherwise noted
Latency = PyTorch FP32 on reference hardware (specify which)
